name: LiveU
description: LiveU — mobile bonded-cellular live video contribution and cloud production

seo.title: LiveU — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: LiveU: LiveU — mobile bonded-cellular live video contribution and cloud production

when_to_use: Cellular bonded video contribution from remote broadcast locations
Live news reporting with sub-second transmission over 5G/LTE
Multi-bonding for reliable broadcast in poor network conditions
Cloud production with LiveU's distributed video contribution
Replacing satellite trucks with IP-based mobile video uplinks

pros: Bonded cellular for broadcast from anywhere
Industry standard for news and sports crews
cons: Hardware costs run into five figures
Subscription required on top of gear
review.verdict: Broadcast-grade field contribution gear — indispensable for TV crews, irrelevant for app developers.
review.best_for: News, sports, and event broadcasters needing reliable field-to-cloud live contribution.
review.not_for: Studio-only productions or API-driven streaming apps.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
